hook.summary: A glowing chest appears with a promise of free gifts, followed by a hand tapping to open it.
hook.visual_action: Text overlay flashes over a mystical background, then a hand taps a magical chest which bursts open with rewards.
hook.text_overlay: FREE GIFTS are waiting for you!

scene_flow: Intro text 'FREE GIFTS are waiting for you!' flashes over a blue mushroom background.
A hand taps a magical chest, triggering an opening animation.
Various fantasy plants and creatures fly out of the chest and settle into a grid.
Final screen displays 'Play & Win' and 'Collect Them All!' with the game logo.
on_screen_text: FREE GIFTS are waiting for you!
audience_proxy: Casual players, particularly women 25-45, who enjoy collection-based puzzle games.
